name: Stickman Race
author: Poki
description: Welcome to the world of Stickman Race, where urban parkour meets intense competition! Feel the thrill as you dash across rooftops, leap, roll, smash through glass, and stick your landings just right. Speed is everything if you want to leave your rivals in the dust! Practice your skills in level mode, or dive into competition mode to face off against others. Use your hard-earned coins to upgrade your look or unlock a cool pet. Do you have what it takes to become the ultimate stickman parkour legend? How to play Stickman Race? Jump or climb up: W or the up arrow key Climb down: S or the down arrow key Move: A/D or left and right arrow keys Who created Stickman Race? Stickman Race is created by WeLoPlay. Play their other games on Poki: Tag , Tag 2 , Stickman Bike , wall-jumper, Fruit Wheel , Glam Girl: Dress Up and Makeover , Nails DIY: Manicure Master , and Hockey Stars ! How can I play Stickman Race for free? You can play Stickman Race for free on Poki. Can I play Stickman Race on mobile devices and desktop? Stickman Race can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
